agent.name: otp-mail-bridge-agent
agent.objective: Forward email one-time passwords to SMS as they arrive.

generated_fine_tuning_data.strategy: Synthesize task-specific instruction/output pairs from user stories and execution traces.

delivery.end_state: A single cross-platform binary is produced and trained via --train before runtime execution.
validations: agent.exe --train must complete successfully before agent.exe runtime mode is allowed to start.
The same binary must support agent growth without producing another fat executable.
Expansion must use either thin-client-to-supernode mode or multi-agent-in-bundle mode.
Packaging must emit binaries for windows, macos, and linux.

unresolved_questions: Which email provider and auth method should the agent use?
What is the delivery latency target and polling strategy?
Which dataset should be used to generate and refine training data?
